item.title: Editing
item.description: General General reference: MD Guide. italics - _italics_. Bold - **Bold**. Headings - ## Top heading ### Subheading #### Subsubheading conent Lists - item 1 - item 1.1 - item 2 - item 2.1 - item 2.2 - item 2.2.1 Spacing Paragraphs are separated by empty lines. Please remove empty spaces at the beginning of lines. As far as possible, prefer paragraphs without any line breaks (“Enter” keystrokes). Just use word-wrap in your editor program.
